name: Highlighted Events
description: Featured events selected by UCM. Must have photo or art available that can be cropped to 600x600 pixel square. Can link to more information.

name: Weekly Events
description: Student-specific events from university calendar. Permalink links. Non-Moscow events indicate location. Chronological by day, Monday through following Sunday. Exclude thesis defenses, student recitals, non-local competitions.

name: News and Updates
description: Timely notices of events, deadlines and activities of general student interest. No repeat of Weekly Events items. Chronological with important items at top.

name: Help Wanted
description: Student job postings from online form. Listed for two weeks. Off-campus jobs link to VandalWeb Career Center page.

name: Academic Dates and Deadlines
description: Pulled from U of I academic calendar. Include 30 days of upcoming information.
